steps.text: Injections silently add or override argument values before forwarding to servers. Use them to inject credentials, set defaults, or enforce policies.
Select which argument to inject. Pick a field from your tool's schema - this is where the value will be inserted.
Enter the value as JSON: "string" (quoted), 42 (number), true (boolean), [1,2,3] (array). This exact value will be injected.
Choose mode: 'set' (always override, even if AI provides value), 'default' (only if missing), 'append' (add to existing arrays/strings).
Click 'Add Injection' to save. Try calling the tool without providing this argument - OpenMaskit injects it automatically!
